Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch base image from Maven-bundled JDK 11 to a standalone JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21 runtime.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 features or compatibility; running on JDK 11 would cause runtime incompatibility or missing API errors for Java 21 code.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian-based package manager (apt-get) with Alpine's package manager (apk) to match the new base image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not have apt-get; using apt-get would result in command not found errors during build.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Maven explicitly via apk since the new base image does not include it.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is a minimal JDK image without Maven; the build step requires Maven to compile the project.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Node.js using nvm instead of the NodeSource apt repository script to support Alpine Linux.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The NodeSource setup script for Debian/Ubuntu is incompatible with Alpine Linux; the previous method would fail to install Node.js.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the project may compile with Java 17 bytecode or fail if the compiler is forced to target 21 but the property says 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); using it causes compile errors or runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Cloud versions are incompatible with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
